background_text: The REACH dashboard helps monitor the progress, effectiveness, and impact of the Resiliency through Azithromycin for Children programme in Nigeria, Niger, and Mali. It provides key insights and analytics to stakeholders, showing how the program is improving the health and lives of children in the countries where it is being implemented.
ana_growth_title: GROWTH BY STATE / REGION (ROUND ON ROUND)
growth_no_data: Need ≥ 2 rounds per state to compute growth.
growth_note: Compares the most recent round vs the previous round per state. Positive bars = children gained; negative bars = children lost.
float_alerts_sub: Schedule emails and arm metric alerts
float_feedback_sub: Report a bug, ask a question or suggest a feature
feedback_kind_bug_desc: Something is broken or behaving unexpectedly
feedback_kind_feature_desc: Suggest a new chart, view or improvement
feedback_kind_data_desc: A figure looks wrong or needs explanation
feedback_kind_general_desc: Anything else you'd like to share
feedback_message_ph: Please describe what you'd like us to know…
feedback_email_hint: We'll only use it if a follow-up is needed.
feedback_err: Could not send. Please try again.
feedback_ok_sub: Your message has been logged. The REACH team will review and respond if a follow-up is needed.
ana_forecast_help: Holt linear trend model. Bands show 80% and 95% prediction intervals; shaded area indicates forecast quarters.
ana_funnel_help: Eligible → Reached → Treated → Reported → Verified. Reveals where the campaign loses ground.
ana_cumulative_help: Running total of unique children reached vs eligible population. Flat sections suggest the same children are being re-treated.
ana_retention_help: Treated(round n+1) ÷ Treated(round n). Above 100% means the next round reached more children; below 100% means it lost ground.
ana_heatmap_help: States × rounds, coloured by coverage. Quickly identifies chronic underperformers and round-to-round consistency.
kpi_eligible_help: Total children aged 1–59 months in the target group for azithromycin distribution.
kpi_treated_help: Eligible children who received azithromycin during the selected rounds.
kpi_percentage_help: Children Treated ÷ Children Eligible, expressed as a percentage.
kpi_sae_help: Severe adverse events reported during the distribution rounds.
kpi_deaths_averted_help: Estimated under-5 deaths prevented, derived from coverage and observed mortality reduction.
chart_eligible_vs_treated_country: CHILDREN ELIGIBLE AND CHILDREN TREATED BY COUNTRY
chart_eligible_vs_treated_state: CHILDREN ELIGIBLE AND CHILDREN TREATED BY STATE / REGION
chart_trend_state: TREND OF CHILDREN TREATED OVER TIME
chart_eligible_vs_treated_country_help: Compares total eligible vs treated children by country for the active filters.
chart_treated_country_help: Choropleth coloured by Percentage Treated; click a country to drill down.
chart_treated_over_time_help: Treatment coverage percentage by distribution quarter.
chart_eligible_vs_treated_state_help: Compares eligible vs treated children by state/region. Click a state on the map to filter the dashboard.
chart_treated_state_help: Choropleth coloured by Percentage Treated. Click a state to drill into its LGAs; click an LGA to filter the dashboard.
chart_trend_state_help: Treatment coverage percentage by quarter for the active scope.
src_regional: Nigerian Institute of Medical Research; AVENIR/PNSO; CVD Mali
download_methodology_help: Indicator definitions, formulas, assumptions and sources for every KPI.
coverage_over_100_note: {{count}} area(s) report coverage above 100%. This typically signals a microplan denominator under-estimate; values are shown as reported (not capped) for verification.
ai_no_recs: No anomalies detected. Coverage is on track.
ai_intro: Hi! Ask me anything about coverage, eligible/treated children, adverse events or deaths averted.
ai_hint_ask: Type a question in plain English or French. Try one of the suggestions below to get started.
ai_hint_insights: Auto-generated observations and next-step recommendations for the current scope. Click an item to copy or share.
ai_hint_whatif: Move the sliders to test 'what if' scenarios. The projected impact below updates live.
ai_suggest_1: Which country has the highest coverage?
ai_suggest_2: What is Nigeria's trend over time?
ai_suggest_3: Which state has the lowest coverage?
whatif_coverage_hint: Lift current % treated by N points
whatif_note: Deterministic projection — adjust assumptions to test plans before committing resources.
subs_hint_reports: Schedule the dashboard to be emailed to one or more recipients on a recurring cadence. Choose which countries to include and the file format.
subs_hint_alerts: Get notified by email when a metric crosses a threshold for a chosen scope (e.g. coverage drops below 85% in Nigeria).
subs_emails_hint: Enter one email and press Enter or comma to add another.
subs_send_time_hint: Time of day to deliver the report (uses {{tz}})
subs_ok_report: Report scheduled. (SMTP not configured — request persisted.)
subs_ok_alert: Alert armed. (SMTP not configured — request persisted.)
subs_err: Could not save. Please check the form.
no_data_for_filters: No data for the active filters
growth_more_reached: more children reached than last round
growth_fewer_reached: fewer children reached than last round
growth_no_change_count: Same number of children received treatment
growth_no_comparison: Not enough rounds yet to show change
login_terms_pre: I have read and agree to the
login_terms_required: You must accept the Terms and Conditions to sign in.
terms_p_acceptance: By accessing and using the REACH Regional Dashboard ("the Dashboard"), you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, you must not use this service.
terms_p_authorized: The Dashboard is provided to authorized personnel of REACH partner institutions — including researchers, policymakers, and public health workers — for the purpose of monitoring azithromycin mass-drug administration programmes in Nigeria, Niger, and Mali.
terms_l_confidentiality_1: Keep your login credentials confidential and not share them with others.
terms_l_confidentiality_2: Not redistribute, republish, or commercialise data accessed through the Dashboard without prior written authorisation from the relevant country institution.
terms_l_confidentiality_3: Comply with all applicable national and international data-protection regulations.
terms_l_confidentiality_4: Report any suspected unauthorised access immediately to the REACH operations team.
terms_l_acceptable_1: Use the Dashboard for any unlawful purpose or in violation of any local, national, or international law.
terms_l_acceptable_2: Attempt to gain unauthorised access to any portion of the Dashboard or its backend systems.
terms_l_acceptable_3: Reverse-engineer, decompile, or interfere with the Dashboard's operation.
terms_l_acceptable_4: Use automated tools (scrapers, bots) to extract bulk data without explicit written permission.
terms_p_accuracy: While every effort is made to ensure accuracy, the data presented:
terms_l_accuracy_1: Is based on figures reported by partner country institutions and may be subject to revision.
terms_l_accuracy_2: Includes model-based estimates (e.g. deaths averted) which carry inherent uncertainty.
terms_l_accuracy_3: Should not be the sole basis for clinical or policy decisions without additional verification.
terms_p_privacy: We collect minimal personal information (username, session token, and access logs) only as required for authentication and audit purposes. Personal data is not shared with third parties and is retained only for the period necessary to operate the service.
terms_p_ip: The Dashboard's underlying code, design, and aggregate analytics are the property of the REACH consortium. Country-level data remains the property of the respective national institutions — Nigerian Institute of Medical Research (NIMR), AVENIR/PNSO, and CVD-Mali — and is licensed for use within the Dashboard under terms agreed with each partner.
terms_p_disclaimer: The Dashboard is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, express or implied. The REACH consortium, eHealth Africa, and partner institutions shall not be liable for any damages arising from the use of, or inability to use, this service.
terms_p_modifications: These Terms may be updated periodically. Material changes will be announced on this page. Continued use of the Dashboard after such updates constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.
terms_p_contact: For questions about these Terms, data use, or to request access, contact: info@ehealthafrica.org or benjamin.shaibu@ehealthnigeria.org.
login_brand_title: Resiliency through Azithromycin for Child Survival.
login_brand_desc: REACH is a regional and international network of researchers, policy makers and public health actors dedicated to reducing child mortality. The REACH network aims to connect participating countries and improve child survival rates through mass administration of the macrolide antibiotic, azithromycin.
login_sub: Enter your credentials to access the dashboard.
click_to_filter: Tip: click a region on the map to filter.
